recommendations.title: The Brady Bunch Movie
recommendations.overview: The original '70s TV family is now placed in the 1990s, where they're even more square and out of place than ever.

recommendations.title: John Tucker Must Die
recommendations.overview: After discovering they are all dating the same same guy, three popular students from different cliques band together for revenge, so they enlist the help of a new gal in town and conspire to break the jerk's heart, while destroying his reputation.

recommendations.title: 28 Days
recommendations.overview: After getting into a car accident while drunk on the day of her sister's wedding, Gwen Cummings is given a choice between prison or a rehab center. She chooses rehab, but is extremely resistant to taking part in any of the treatment programs they hav

recommendations.title: Doctor Dolittle
recommendations.overview: A successful physician and devoted family man, John Dolittle seems to have the world by the tail, until a long suppressed talent he possessed as a child, the ability to communicate with animals is suddenly reawakened with a vengeance! Now every creat

recommendations.title: Private Parts
recommendations.overview: The life and career of shock-jock superstar Howard Stern is recounted from his humble beginnings to his view from the top. Possessing a desire to be an on-air personality since childhood, Stern meanders through the radio world, always with his suppor

recommendations.title: Tenet
recommendations.overview: Armed with only one word - Tenet - and fighting for the survival of the entire world, the Protagonist journeys through a twilight world of international espionage on a mission that will unfold in something beyond real time.

recommendations.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
recommendations.overview: As the gang return to Jumanji to rescue one of their own, they discover that nothing is as they expect. The players will have to brave parts unknown and unexplored in order to escape the world’s most dangerous game.

recommendations.title: TRON: Ares
recommendations.overview: A highly sophisticated Program called Ares is sent from the digital world into the real world on a dangerous mission, marking humankind's first encounter with A.I. beings.

recommendations.title: Anna
recommendations.overview: Beneath Anna Poliatova's striking beauty lies a secret that will unleash her indelible strength and skill to become one of the world's most feared government assassins.

recommendations.title: Hey Arnold! The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Adventure, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Arnold and his friends must recover a stolen document in order to prevent the neighborhood from being bulldozed.
